h265_packet_header_t(3) Library Functions Manual h265_packet_header_t(3)

NAME

h265_packet_header_t

SYNOPSIS

#include <src/session/h265/protocol.h>

Data Fields


uint8_t type
uint32_t client_id
uint32_t frame_num
uint8_t flags
uint8_t reserved

Detailed Description

H.265 packet header structure Embedded in network packets for codec frames

Layout: [type: u8][client_id: u32][frame_num: u32][flags: u8][reserved: u8][payload...]
